title: Project Neo
description: LLM-Powered Voice-Responsive Robot. Architected an embodied AI system integrating the Gemini API with Raspberry Pi for real-time voice interaction. Designed a low-latency pipeline for speech input, LLM inference, and robotic actuation under hardware constraints.

title: FarmGrid
description: Agricultural Technology Hackathon Project. Spearheaded system design translating agricultural challenges into technical architectures under strict time constraints.

title: Neural Nexus Game
description: Built an interactive web system emphasizing user engagement and human-centered design principles.

title: Mini E-ATV
description: Electric All-Terrain Vehicle. Engineered a mini electric ATV applying interdisciplinary system thinking across mechanical and control concepts.
